sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITAs 861 to 864 of 2000 ITAs 876 & 877 of 2000 ITAs 946 & 947 of 2000 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.337/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 05.11.2025 None present for the appellant. Mr. Muhammad Nawaz Mirza, advocate holding brief for Mr. M. Bilal Bhatti, advocate for the respondents. These appeals are pending from the year 2000 without any significant progress. Even today, appellants are unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the appellants are not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
